description_long: This is a modern four-door police car, modeled after a Dodge Charger, with a robust and muscular body style. The exterior is primarily dark gray or black, with prominent 'POLICE' lettering in blue on the sides and additional yellow text reading 'AGGRESSIVE DRIVER ENFORCEMENT' below. The vehicle features a push bumper on the front, blacked-out wheels, and tinted windows, giving it a tactical and authoritative appearance. Emergency lights are visible on the front grille and rear, with blue and red coloring, but there is no roof-mounted light bar. The rear of the car displays a 'POLICE' label and a license plate, while the sides have additional police markings and a small flag decal. The overall design is sleek, functional, and clearly intended for law enforcement use in urban environments.
description: A dark gray police car with blue 'POLICE' markings, push bumper, emergency lights, and 'AGGRESSIVE DRIVER ENFORCEMENT' text on the sides. It features tinted windows, black wheels, and a robust, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the push bumper, tinted windshield, and grille-mounted emergency lights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the blue 'POLICE' text, yellow enforcement slogan, and a small flag decal near the front fender.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the 'POLICE' label, rear emergency lights, and a visible license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with 'POLICE' and enforcement text, and clear view of the car's sleek profile.
attribute_police_markings: Blue 'POLICE' text on both side doors, yellow 'AGGRESSIVE DRIVER ENFORCEMENT' text below the 'POLICE' label, and a small flag decal near the front fender. Rear has 'POLICE' text above the license plate. All markings are in bold, block letters for high visibility.
attribute_emergency_lights: Emergency lights are present on the front grille and rear of the vehicle, featuring blue and red colors. No roof-mounted light bar is visible.
attribute_license_plate: License plate is visible on the rear, colored yellow with black text, and appears to have special markings or codes typical of police vehicles.
